zo_reasoning: Meeting focused exclusively on Careerspan product demo and recruiting tools. No Zo partnerships, features, or GTM strategies discussed. External recruiter business is not Zo-adjacent.
careerspan_reasoning: Direct customer feedback session with product demonstration. Discussed market fit (high-volume vs. headhunting), product value proposition vs. traditional ATS, and roadmap planning based on recruiter input. Recruiter is potential customer/partner.

create_new_deals.rationale: External recruiter (referred to as 'mate') provided detailed product feedback, identified specific use cases (high-volume inbound roles), and expressed interest in candidate insights/quick scan features. Active customer discussion with clear partnership potential.

summary: Customer feedback meeting with external recruiter who found Careerspan valuable for high-volume inbound hiring but less relevant for elite headhunting. Discussed product roadmap and potential partnership features.
